title: senecio matatini
intro: Senecio matatini, also known as Matatini bush or Groundsel bush, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio matatini include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
